seo_title: Hot Flashes and Night Sweats: 7-Step Sleep Protocol for Perimenopause
meta_description: Hot flashes and night sweats destroying your sleep? This 7-step protocol for perimenopausal women addresses both vasomotor symptoms and the cortisol-driven 3am waking with evidence-based interventions.
